---
title: "Data Pipeline – SG Housing Affordability vs Income"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(readxl)
library(knitr)

data_path <- "Part 2/Data/"
dp <- function(f) paste0(data_path, f)
```

## Raw Data Ingestion

### Household Income by Decile
```{r}
income_raw <- read_excel(
  dp("Household Income by Income Decile.xlsx"),
  sheet = 1, skip = 10, n_max = 12
)

colnames(income_raw)[1] <- "Decile"
income_raw <- income_raw %>% select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))

income_long <- income_raw %>%
  filter(!str_detect(Decile, "Total|Deciles"), !is.na(Decile)) %>%
  mutate(Decile = str_trim(Decile)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Decile, names_to = "Year", values_to = "Income_Nominal") %>%
  mutate(
    Year = as.integer(Year),
    Income_Nominal = as.numeric(Income_Nominal)
  ) %>%
  filter(Year >= 2000, Year <= 2025, !is.na(Income_Nominal))

kable(head(income_long, 10))
```

### CPI by Household Income Group (Annual, Group-Specific)
```{r}
load_cpi_annual <- function(filepath, group_label) {
  raw <- read_excel(filepath, sheet = 1, skip = 10, n_max = 2)
  colnames(raw)[1] <- "Series"
  
  raw %>%
    filter(str_trim(Series) == "All Items") %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -Series, names_to = "Year", values_to = "CPI") %>%
    mutate(
      Year = as.integer(str_trim(Year)),
      CPI  = as.numeric(CPI),
      Group = group_label
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Year), !is.na(CPI), Year >= 2000, Year <= 2025) %>%
    select(Group, Year, CPI)
}

cpi_bottom <- load_cpi_annual(
  dp("CPI By Household Income Group (Lowest 20%) Annual.xlsx"), "Bottom 20%")
cpi_middle <- load_cpi_annual(
  dp("CPI By Household Income Group (Middle 60%) Annual.xlsx"), "Middle 60%")
cpi_top    <- load_cpi_annual(
  dp("CPI By Household Income Group (Top 20%) Annual.xlsx"),    "Top 20%")

cpi_grouped <- bind_rows(cpi_bottom, cpi_middle, cpi_top)

kable(cpi_grouped %>% filter(Year %in% c(2000, 2005, 2010, 2015, 2020, 2025)))
```

### HDB Resale Transaction Data
```{r}
hdb_files <- c(
  dp("ResaleFlatPricesBasedonApprovalDate2000Feb2012.csv"),
  dp("ResaleFlatPricesBasedonRegistrationDateFromMar2012toDec2014.csv"),
  dp("ResaleFlatPricesBasedonRegistrationDateFromJan2015toDec2016.csv"),
  dp("ResaleflatpricesbasedonregistrationdatefromJan2017onwards.csv")
)

hdb_raw <- map_dfr(hdb_files, function(f) {
  read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())) %>%
    select(month, resale_price)
})
kable(head(hdb_raw, 5))
```

## Data Cleaning and Standardisation
```{r}
# Aggregate deciles into 3 income groups
income_grouped <- income_long %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      Decile %in% c("1st (Lowest)", "2nd")                     ~ "Bottom 20%",
      Decile %in% c("3rd", "4th", "5th", "6th", "7th", "8th") ~ "Middle 60%",
      Decile %in% c("9th", "10th (Highest)")                   ~ "Top 20%"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Group)) %>%
  group_by(Group, Year) %>%
  summarise(Income_Nominal = mean(Income_Nominal, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Compute annual median HDB resale price
hdb_annual <- hdb_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Year = as.integer(str_extract(month, "\\d{4}")),
    resale_price = as.numeric(resale_price)
  ) %>%
  filter(Year >= 2000, Year <= 2025) %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(HDB_Median_Price = median(resale_price, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

kable(hdb_annual)
```

## Data Transformation and Aggregation

### Step 1: Deflate Nominal Income → Real Income (2024 base)
```{r}
income_real <- income_grouped %>%
  left_join(cpi_grouped, by = c("Group", "Year")) %>%
  mutate(Income_Real = Income_Nominal / (CPI / 100))

kable(head(income_real, 10))
```

### Step 2: Rebase All Series to 2010 = 100
```{r}
# Get 2010 base values for each group
base_income <- income_real %>%
  filter(Year == 2010) %>%
  select(Group, Base_Real = Income_Real)

base_hdb <- hdb_annual %>%
  filter(Year == 2010) %>%
  pull(HDB_Median_Price)

# Index real income
income_indexed <- income_real %>%
  left_join(base_income, by = "Group") %>%
  mutate(Income_Index = round(Income_Real / Base_Real * 100, 1)) %>%
  select(Year, Group, Income_Nominal, CPI, Income_Real, Income_Index)

# Index HDB prices
hdb_indexed <- hdb_annual %>%
  mutate(HDB_Index = round(HDB_Median_Price / base_hdb * 100, 1))

kable(income_indexed %>% filter(Year %in% c(2000, 2005, 2010, 2015, 2020, 2025)))
kable(hdb_indexed %>% filter(Year %in% c(2000, 2005, 2010, 2015, 2020, 2025)))
```

## Data Validation and Quality Checks
```{r}
# Check 2010 = 100 for all groups
cat("Income index at 2010:\n")
print(income_indexed %>% filter(Year == 2010) %>% select(Group, Income_Index))

cat("\nHDB index at 2010:\n")
print(hdb_indexed %>% filter(Year == 2010) %>% select(Year, HDB_Index))

# Check for missing values
cat("\nMissing values in income_indexed:", any(is.na(income_indexed)), "\n")
cat("Missing values in hdb_indexed:", any(is.na(hdb_indexed)), "\n")

# Check row counts
cat("Income rows:", nrow(income_indexed), "(expected 78 = 26 years × 3 groups)\n")
cat("HDB rows:", nrow(hdb_indexed), "(expected 26)\n")
```

## Final Tidy Dataset
```{r}
# Income in long format
income_long_final <- income_indexed %>%
  select(Year, Income_Group = Group, Index_Value = Income_Index) %>%
  mutate(Measure_Type = "Real Income")

# HDB replicated for each income group
hdb_long_final <- hdb_indexed %>%
  select(Year, Index_Value = HDB_Index) %>%
  crossing(Income_Group = c("Bottom 20%", "Middle 60%", "Top 20%")) %>%
  mutate(Measure_Type = "HDB Resale Price")

# Combine
tidy_data <- bind_rows(income_long_final, hdb_long_final) %>%
  mutate(
    Income_Group = factor(Income_Group,
                          levels = c("Bottom 20%", "Middle 60%", "Top 20%")),
    Measure_Type = factor(Measure_Type,
                          levels = c("Real Income", "HDB Resale Price"))
  ) %>%
  select(Year, Income_Group, Measure_Type, Index_Value) %>%
  arrange(Year, Income_Group, Measure_Type)

kable(
  tidy_data %>% filter(Year %in% c(2000, 2010, 2020, 2025)),
  col.names = c("Year", "Income Group", "Measure Type", "Index (2010 = 100)")
)
```

## Save Clean Dataset
```{r}
saveRDS(tidy_data, "tidy_data.rds")
cat("tidy_data.rds saved successfully.\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(tidy_data), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(tidy_data), "\n")
```
